message:
feat: replace Graphviz and resvg-js with pure Zig WASM implementations

Remove @hpcc-js/wasm-graphviz and @resvg/resvg-js npm dependencies,
replacing them with pure Zig compiled to the existing WASM module:

- Zig Sugiyama layout: layer assignment, virtual nodes, barycenter
  crossing minimization, coordinate assignment, orthogonal edge routing
- Zig PNG rasterizer: shape rendering, 8×16 bitmap font, PNG encoder
  with zlib stored blocks
- Layout chain simplified to 2 tiers: WASM Sugiyama → TS grid fallback

Core deps now: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod (MCP protocol only).
